en_us:
['You’ve made it.
The truth remains.', 'Even if it was only a small step,
you held your ground.', 'You listened.
 The path opened.', '> You made it here
> 
> The rules were simple —
> 
> the choice was yours.', '> Distance became meaning.
> 
> and time answered your footsteps.', '> Not everything shines forever.
> 
> But this moment did.', 'Light fell evenly, ,
and every shadow vanished.', 'The wind fell silent.
and everything returned to where it belonged.', 'A moment of silence.
The world steadied its breath.', 'The record is etched deep in the sand—
beyond the reach of the wind.', 'Harmony was restored.
Everything had been for this moment.', 'Time slipped by in silence,
tucked away in the corners of memory.', 'The sky shifted in color,
and one story came to its end.', 'The waves grew calm,
and the sea hid its depths once more.', 'The footsteps stopped,
and only the place remained.', 'Victory and defeat 
are nothing more than grains of sand.', 'The road goes on—or it ends.
Either way, it lies on the same earth.']

en_us:
['In the north wind,
clarity outlasts speed.', 'The center was found.
 The world came to rest.', 'The stars stay silent.
Your record does the speaking.', 'The result  remained.
The position changed.', 'Between ice and glass,
you chose control.', 'The waves fell quiet,
and the sea reclaimed its hidden depths.', 'Some treasures still await.
Next time, a different path.', 'The sky didn’t change.
You did.', 'The moment passed.
What remained was order.', 'Winter is honest.
So was your run.', 'The stars aligned for a moment.
You noticed.', 'The distance closed.
Time did not.', 'The world’s rules stood firm.
 And the signal of possibility was real.', 'The path closed quietly.
You were already through.', 'Nothing changed.
Only your position did.', 'Not luck.
Alignment.', 'The moment passed.
The record remains.', 'The outcome didn’t change.
Still, you moved forward.', 'The output didn’t change.

en_us:
['The distance has found its meaning.
Time has rewarded your journey.', 'The time is up.
but the rest is far from over.', 'The axis is found.
the world has cased its motion.', 'The glass held its breath,
and you held your ground.', 'Under the stillness of the sky,
your spirit did not waver.', 'Few things shine forever.
but this moment was radiant.', 'You traversed the fragile earth,
without losing the view.', 'The moment has passed.
The legacy remains.', 'Luck fades fast.
order endures.', 'The sky knows no pause in endless circle,
nor shall you find yours.', 'The center has been reached.
The world stood still.', 'Finally here.
The truth remains unyielding.', 'You have seen it through.
And mark this: it was you, and no one else, who chose this path.', 'Time drifted into silence,
finding its place in the recesses of the mind.', 'As the sky transformed,
the tale found its final resolved.', 'The waters fell calm,
and the sky once more veiled its abyss.', 'The footsteps ceased,
only the place remained.', 'Light fell evenly, ,
and every shadow vanished.', 'The wind fell silent.
and everything returned to where it belonged.', 'A moment of silence.
The world steadied its breath.', 'The record is etched deep in the sand—
beyond the reach of the wind.', 'Harmony was restored.
Everything had been for this moment.', "RUN COMPLETE.
Clear. Found it.
That's enough.", 'RUN COMPLETE.
The path held.
So did you.', 'The sky has kept moving.
So can you.', 'RUN COMPLETE.
A quiet result.
The weight of real work.', 'You only walked the path
the world had laid out for you.', 'The ground didn’t give way.
It trusted your steps.', 'This moment aligned
with the stars’ ancient rhythm.', 'You didn’t take anything.
 You understood something.', 'You didn’t gain a thing.
You only saw the truth for what it was.', 'You didn’t take this place.
You belonged here.', 'You walked a road
older than memory itself.', 'The earth did not resist.
It recognized you.', 'This moment aligned
 with the stillness of the stars.']

en_us:
['Even the aurora fades.
Come back with a new stride.', 'In a fragile world,
haste shatters clarity before it can be found.', 'The moment slipped away.
The meaning did not.', 'Winter is patient.
Be the same.', 'The sky kept moving.
So will you.', 'The story moves on.
The end is not yet.', 'The stars were there, watching.
Again.', 'Ice takes its time.
Neither do you.', 'The sky kept moving.
So can you.', 'The north has learned to wait.
So should you.', 'This is an interlude
—It’s not over.', 'Like drifting clouds,
don’t lose your flow—like a river.', 'The sound was near.
The distance was real.
But that moment can’t be saved.', 'You were closing in.
Only time wasn’t.', 'The world held to its rules.
You touched the edge of them.', 'You didn’t reach the treasure. 
But the signal was real.', 'Nothing changed.
Only your position did.', 'It wasn’t luck.
